nodes.name: Calendar Sync Trigger
nodes.notes: Called after an appointment is confirmed. Receives: appointment_id, patient_name, patient_phone, doctor_name, appointment_date, start_time, end_time, doctor_email

parameters.query:
SELECT a.id, a.appointment_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.google_event_id,
       p.name AS patient_name, p.phone AS patient_phone, p.email AS patient_email,
       d.name AS doctor_name, d.email AS doctor_email, d.specialization,
       s.name AS service_name,
       c.name AS clinic_name, c.address AS clinic_address, c.phone AS clinic_phone, c.timezone
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.id
JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.id
JOIN clinic c ON a.clinic_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN services s ON a.service_id = s.id
WHERE a.id = '{{ $json.body.appointment_id }}';

parameters.start: ={{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.appointment_date }}T{{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.start_time }}
parameters.end: ={{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.appointment_date }}T{{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.end_time }}

additionalFields.summary: ={{ '🏥 ' + $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.patient_name + ' — ' + ($('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.service_name || 'Consultation') }}
additionalFields.location: ={{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.clinic_name + ', ' + $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.clinic_address }}

parameters.query: UPDATE appointments SET google_event_id = '{{ $json.id }}' WHERE id = '{{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.id }}';
UPDATE appointments SET google_event_id = NULL WHERE id = '{{ $('Get Full Appointment Details').first().json.id }}';
